single_gpu.raw:
=== Device 0: NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3 ===
  SM count:          132
  Clock rate:        1980 MHz
  Memory:            79.3 GB
  L2 Cache:          51200 KB
  Shared mem/block:  48 KB
  Warp size:         32
  Compute cap:       9.0
  ~Peak FP32:        33.5 TFLOPS

===== Correctness Verification (M=N=K=256) =====
1_naive             :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
2_coalesced         :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
2_uncoalesced       :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
3_smem              :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
4_1d_blocktile      :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
5_2d_blocktile      :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
6_vectorized        :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
7_warptile          :   PASS (max_diff=0.000007)
cuBLAS              :   PASS (max_diff=0.000013)

===== Performance Benchmark (GFLOPS) =====
Kernel                  256    512   1024   2048   4096
-------------------------------------------------------
1_naive                2295   5588   6050   6195   6326
2_coalesced            2296   5548   6043   6223   6326
2_uncoalesced           236    482    486    487    498
3_smem                 3071   8011   9037   9228   9044
4_1d_blocktile         1477   6241  17589  17528  17034
5_2d_blocktile          642   2724  12125  21389  22044
6_vectorized            681   2845  11653  32333  32612
7_warptile              670   2854  12776  29824  31265
cuBLAS                 2564  17120  37366  50260  51712

Done.

Size      GEMM(ms)    Comm(ms)     Ratio
------------------------------------------------------
2048         0.495       0.462      0.93
4096         0.775       0.598      0.77
8192         3.074       1.116      0.36

Kernel                  GEMM(ms)    Comm(ms)     Ratio
------------------------------------------------------
1_naive                    3.148       0.634      0.20
2_coalesced                3.141       0.634      0.20
3_smem                     2.256       0.634      0.28
4_1d_blocktile             1.319       0.634      0.48
5_2d_blocktile             1.147       0.634      0.55
6_vectorized               1.229       0.634      0.52
7_warptile                 1.081       0.634      0.59
cuBLAS                     0.733       0.634      0.86

===== Exp 5: Parallel MLP Forward + Backward (8 GPUs) =====
M      H      N      GPUs       Fwd(ms)     Bwd(ms)   Total(ms)
-----------------------------------------------------------
2048   2048   2048   8            0.711       0.773       1.485
4096   4096   4096   8            1.517       2.169       3.686
8192   8192   8192   8            6.929      12.207      19.136

===== Exp 6: Row Parallel — No Overlap vs Overlap (8 GPUs) =====
Size    Chunks    NoOvlp(ms)  Overlap(ms)   Speedup
------------------------------------------------------
2048    4              0.611       0.675      0.91x
4096    4              1.133       1.193      0.95x
8192    4              4.256       4.152      1.02x

Done.
